codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocking bug. Writer failure persistence now uses the same conditional terminal-failure update path as the scheduler, so inline discussion failures and parser-fallback note failures persist `review_runs.status='failed'` while retaining machine-readable `error_code` and `error_detail` fields. Regression tests cover both failure modes.

summary: Reviewed the fix handoff, transcript skeleton, go-reliability skill, prior failed review, and commit `739d527698f0f5c58a4fc66dc313eff8d98c2d8b`. The implementation resolves the original blocking issue: writer writeback failures now terminalize review runs as `failed` with preserved machine-readable error details, and targeted regressions cover both inline and parser-fallback failure paths.
